description.description: Optional identifier for the resource, used for referencing other resources.

dest_range.description: Specifies the destination IP range in CIDR format for the route. Must be a valid CIDR block.

name.description: The name of the route resource, must be unique within the project and adhere to naming constraints.

network.description: The network to which this route applies. Must be a valid network resource.

next_hop_gateway.description: Specifies the gateway for the next hop. Use a valid gateway resource identifier.

next_hop_ilb.description: Internal load balancer to use as the next hop, if applicable. Must be a valid resource identifier.

next_hop_instance.description: Specifies the instance to use as the next hop. Provide a valid instance resource identifier.

next_hop_instance_zone.description: The zone of the next hop instance. Must match the zone of the specified instance.

next_hop_ip.description: The IP address of the next hop. Must be a valid IP address within the same network.

next_hop_vpn_tunnel.description: Specifies the VPN tunnel to use as the next hop. Must reference a valid VPN tunnel resource.

priority.description: Defines the priority of the route. Lower values indicate higher priority. Must be a non-negative number.

tags.description: A list of instance tags that this route applies to. Tags must be strings and unique within the list.

timeouts.description: Specifies custom create and delete operation timeouts. Provide values as strings in duration format (e.g., '30m').
